Slow Food

As a writer for Slow Food International, I've covered food cultures and traditions from around the world.

Selected articles:

  • The Future of Food is in Our Hands
  • Food Waste Scandal
  • Slow Fish 2015
  • The Ark of Taste in Canada

Through Slow Food, I've explored:

  • Traditional food preservation techniques
  • Indigenous food cultures
  • Local food movements
  • Biodiversity in agriculture
  • Food communities worldwide
